nodes.name: Layer 1: KURADASHI + Otameshi scrape
nodes.notes: Use Playwright service for JS-rendered lists. Target near-expiry craft food with >70% profit tier potential.

nodes.name: Layer 2: BASE calcOptimalOrder scan
nodes.notes: For each shop: detect free-shipping threshold and autocompute optimal order quantity. Drop if no threshold OR threshold > $200 USD equivalent.

nodes.name: Layer 3: Amazon US filter
nodes.notes: Reject any SKU already listed on Amazon US at <30% markup vs JP price (arbitrage dead).

parameters.text: =🗾 Sericia Drop candidates ready: {{ $json.count }} items, tiers={{ $json.tiers }}. Approve to post?

nodes.name: Slack approval (Block Kit)
nodes.notes: Block Kit with Approve/Reject buttons. On Approve -> POST to Medusa /admin/products.
